steps.title: Identify the antecedent and its number
steps.content: The blank pronoun refers back to “poems” from the opening sentence — a plural noun. The phrase “these works” confirms we're tracking multiple items.

steps.title: Apply pronoun-antecedent agreement
steps.content: A pronoun must match its antecedent in number. “Them” is the plural pronoun that matches the plural antecedent “poems.” The other choices are all singular (this, that, it) and violate the agreement rule. That matches choice A — A is correct.
